name: 高府产房
era_style: 明代晚期官宦府邸产房
description: 临时改建的产房，中央产床铺血巾与稳婆工具，旁边小桌放药碗与婴儿摇篮，墙面挂帘布遮挡，地面木板，烛火照明，空间紧迫而紧张。
visual_reference: Urgent Ming dynasty late period official mansion delivery room interior at night, central birthing bed with blood-stained cloths and midwife tools, side table with medicine bowl and infant cradle, hanging curtains for privacy, wooden floor, candlelit tense atmosphere, period medical details
atmosphere: 生死攸关的紧张与希望
lighting: 多盏烛火与油灯交织，投下剧烈明暗对比
